name: MainWindow
summary: The MainWindow class is a class for binding the .NET dialogs under the Tekla Structures main window.

methods.name: AddExternalWindow
methods.signature: public void AddExternalWindow(string Name, IntPtr Handle)
methods.summary: Registers the entire dialog to be insensitive at certain points, for example while modal Tekla Structures system dialog boxes are open. When insensitive, the dialog does not respond to any input. You can remove the registration of the dialog with RemoveExternalWindow(String, IntPtr).

params.name: Name
params.doc: The unique name of the form.

params.name: Handle
params.doc: The handle to the form that is to be added.

methods.name: RemoveExternalWindow
methods.signature: public void RemoveExternalWindow(string Name, IntPtr Handle)
methods.summary: Removes a registration done with AddExternalWindow(String, IntPtr).

params.name: Name
params.doc: The unique name of the form.

params.name: Handle
params.doc: The handle to the form that is to be removed.
